description: Contact Detail Action Button Wiring. 18 buttons without onClick handlers: Email (1133), Log Call (1139), Log Activity submit (1426), Add Deal (1872), Create Ticket (1917), Upload (1958), Add Note (2007, 2214), View Map (1341), Play Recording (969), Download (1039), Reply/React/Add Note/Share activity actions (1076-1099), toolbar buttons (1410/1415/1420).
